title: critoniopsis woytkowskii
intro: Critoniopsis woytkowskii is a species of flowering plant in the aster family, known for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene compounds. The health benefits of Critoniopsis woytkowskii include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Critoniopsis woytkowskii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
